description: Decisions made by agents, stored in core.agent_decisions (src/shared/infrastructure/database/models/learning.py). SQLAlchemy ORM class. __tablename__ and __table_args__ are ClassVar metaclass annotations included in properties to suppress false-positive undeclared-field findings from the AST gate (same pattern as BlackboardEntry) — these are not data fields. options_considered is JSONB with no Python class governing its shape (fourth JSONB-only shape gap alongside ProposalConsequence, ConstitutionalViolationPayload, WorkerDeclaration). confidence is Numeric(3, 2) — allows 0.00–9.99 but semantic range is 0.0–1.0; no CHECK constraint. AgentMemory (sibling ORM class) carries memory_type with comment-documented vocabulary (fact/observation/decision/pattern/error) — not enum-typed. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

__tablename__.description: SQLAlchemy ClassVar — table name 'agent_decisions'. Not a data field; included to suppress AST gate false positives (issue #368).

__table_args__.description: SQLAlchemy ClassVar — table arguments (schema: core). Not a data field; included to suppress AST gate false positives (issue #368).

id.description: Primary key UUID. Generated via uuid.uuid4.

task_id.description: Foreign key to core.tasks.id. The task this decision belongs to.

decision_point.description: Human-readable description of the decision point reached.

options_considered.description: JSONB payload of options evaluated at this decision point (Mapped[dict]). Shape is ungoverned — no Python class exists for options_considered sub-structure (JSONB gap #4).

reasoning.description: Explanation of why this option was chosen.

confidence.description: Agent confidence in the decision (Numeric(3, 2)). Semantic range 0.0–1.0; DB type permits 0.00–9.99 with no CHECK constraint.

was_correct.description: Whether the decision proved correct in hindsight (bool | None). Nullable — populated by feedback loop.

decided_at.description: Timestamp when this decision was recorded. Server default now().
